message:
fix(codegen): Add method shadowing checks to with.zig hoisting

Variables hoisted inside with blocks now correctly detect when they
shadow sibling class methods or the current function name:

- Added shadows_current_function check in with.zig hoistVarWithExpr
- Added shadows_class_method check using current_class_body
- Fixed loader variable shadowing in test_importlib/test_abc

Also includes previous session fixes:
- Added current_function_name setting in class_methods.zig for
  inherited methods
- Added current_function_name setting in logic_table_class.zig
- Extended shadows_class_member check in value_generation.zig
